item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 5h A RECORD-BREAKER!
11 Chinese players will compete at the Crucible for the very first time
Zhao Xi
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 5h A RECORD-BREAKER!
11 Chinese players will compete at the Crucible for the very first time
Zhao Xintong Xiao Guodong Wu Yize Si Jiahui Ding Junhui Zhang Anda Zhou Yuelong Pang Junxu Lei Peifan He Guoqiang Fan Zhengyi 8 16 102 6 mil
